steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The assignment has $x$ one-point questions and $y$ two-point questions. The total must equal 28. We need an equation relating $x$, $y$, and 28.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — $xy = 28$: multiplies the two question counts, but the total points should be a sum. ✗
  • Choice B — ${3}(x + y) = 28$: treats every question as worth 3 points. ✗
  • Choice C — $x + y = 28$: counts questions, not points, because it does not give the 2-point questions double weight. ✗
  • Choice D — $x + 2y = 28$: $x$ one-point questions contribute $x$ points; $y$ two-point questions contribute $2y$ points; total $= 28$. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
